---
title: "Welcome to jaxcmr"
description: "Introducing jaxcmr: JAX-accelerated computational memory modeling"
author: "jaxcmr team"
date: "2024-01-01"
categories: [announcement]
---

Welcome to the jaxcmr blog! This is where we'll share updates on the library, tutorials for computational memory modeling, and notes from ongoing research.

## What is jaxcmr?

jaxcmr is a JAX-accelerated toolkit for modeling memory search using Context Maintenance and Retrieval (CMR) models. It provides:

- **Fast simulation**: JIT-compiled model simulations
- **Differentiable**: JAX enables automatic differentiation
- **Fitting**: Differential evolution for parameter estimation
- **Analyses**: Standard behavioral measures (SPC, CRP, etc.)

## Getting Started

Check out the [Getting Started](/getting-started/) guide to install jaxcmr and run your first simulation.

## Stay Updated

We'll post here about:

- New features and releases
- Tutorials and tips
- Research findings using jaxcmr
- Technical deep-dives into CMR

Subscribe to the [RSS feed](/blog/index.xml) to stay updated.
